title: Elf's About Deluxe Santa Outfit, Red Plush Costume with White Trim for 15-17cm Dolls, Christmas Elf Accessory (2)
features: PERFECT FIT: Designed to fit elf dolls measuring 15-17 centimetres in height, ensuring a snug and proper fit for your festive companion
DELUXE DESIGN: Features a plush red Santa-style outfit with classic white trim detailing and a traditional black belt accent
QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from soft plush fabric that's comfortable and easy to put on and remove from your elf doll
FESTIVE STYLING: Complete Santa-inspired costume includes a red suit with white collar and matching trim for authentic holiday charm
SEASONAL ACCESSORY: Perfect Christmas clothing addition to transform your elf doll into a miniature Santa's helper for holiday displays
description: Transform your beloved elf doll into a festive Santa's helper with this delightful Elf's About Santa Outfit. Crafted from soft, plush fabric in classic Christmas red with crisp white trim, this charming costume brings holiday magic to life. Perfectly sized to fit elf dolls measuring 15-17 centimetres, the outfit features a traditional Santa-style design complete with a black belt detail. The comfortable and easy-to-dress ensemble includes a cosy red jacket with white collar detailing, making your elf ready for all their North Pole adventures. This adorable costume accessory adds an extra sprinkle of Christmas cheer to your holiday décor and makes a perfect addition to your elf's wardrobe. Keep the festive spirit alive with this enchanting Santa outfit that turns your elf into the most stylish helper at the North Pole.

specifications_table.Material Care Instructions: ‎Air Dry, Do Not Bleach, Hand Wash Only
